title: selaginella rivalis
intro: Selaginella rivalis, also known as the Asian spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Selaginella rivalis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress, which can contribute to chronic diseases like cancer and cardiovascular disease. In herbal preparations, Selaginella rivalis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
